title: Kessuko Band Paintings (Bocchi The Rock)
description: Now you can use bocchi the rock paintings
body:
🎨 **Kessoku Band Paintings Datapack *Bocchi the Rock! Gallery Edition***  
Turn your Minecraft walls into an anime stage!  
This datapack adds **17 custom paintings** featuring the members of **Kessoku Band** from *Bocchi the Rock!*, perfect for decorating bases, studios, or jukebox lounges.

✨ **Features**  
✅ Adds 17 unique paintings inspired by *Bocchi the Rock!*
✅ yes
🧩 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.16+
